## Fixes applied (re-run)
- **Section 3**: was preamble footnote "In Sind 24-12-1975"; now picks substantive "References to Code of Criminal Procedure…" via best-match scoring
- **Sections 491/497**: amendment brackets like `7[Any High Court]` now kept as `Any High Court` in body_clean
- **Section 154**: fuller text captured (Provincial Government substitution preserved)

## Re-run

python3 extract_crpc.py    # refresh crpc_sections.csv + console report
python3 ingest_crpc.py     # upsert into legal_sections (CrPC only)
